text:
<<On Mon, 19 Jan 1998 00:01:21 -0800 (PST), shiba@mxs.meshnet.or.jp said:

> -
> +       pp->remote_host = 0;

This patch is erroneous.  init_printer() is responsible for all such
initializations.

-GAWollman
